title: Bộ Quần Áo Bóng Rổ Elite Việt Nam Đen X24-BR-025
prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: square WooCommerce product image for mayaobongro.vn

Image 1 is a garment-design reference only. Preserve black base with red/grey accents and Vietnam flag detail, subtle dark geometric pattern and Vietnam spirit marks, and valid team/design marks for Elite Việt Nam. Text decisions: preserve Elite and Vietnam flag detail if readable; remove running wording. Remove adult models, road/park/lake running scene, mayaochaybo.vn, hotline, old running logo, footer/header frame, and running-shirt cut.

Convert the garment into an authentic basketball uniform: wider basketball shoulders, rib-knit neckline and armholes, relaxed straight torso, longer hem covering the shorts waistband. Pair it with loose knee-length basketball shorts coordinated with the jersey palette, trim, panels, and motif. Never default to plain black shorts unless black is the intentional dominant design color and still add coordinated accents.

Composition: Square 1:1, three-quarter body, garment fully visible, thumbnail-readable front design and coordinated shorts.

Style: Photorealistic commercial Vietnamese school sportswear photography, realistic breathable mesh, natural folds, correct anatomy.

Constraints: fictional student only, age-appropriate, non-sexualized, no exposed midriff, no real school identifiers, no extra logos, no running terminology, no watermark.

Scene: covered elementary school basketball court, soft daylight, generic hoop visible, no readable school identity.

Subject: One fictional Vietnamese elementary-school basketball player, age 9-10, natural child proportions, friendly confident expression, holding a basketball at waist height. The player must look like a child, not a scaled-down adult.
